# Clary — Clinic Management SaaS for Uzbekistan and CIS

> Enterprise multi-tenant clinic management SaaS with catalog-driven configuration, BYO payments/SMS, 7 languages (uz-Latn, uz-Cyrl, ru, kk, ky, tg, en), daily Telegram backup, Marketing 2.0, and healthcare-grade compliance (Persdata 547-son, GDPR-ready).

## Product
- [Home](https://clary.uz/): Value proposition, features, pricing
- [Features](https://clary.uz/features): Full feature matrix
- [Pricing](https://clary.uz/pricing): Demo / 25PRO / 50PRO / 120PRO

## Integrations
- Payments: Click, Payme, Uzum, Kaspi, Humo, Uzcard, Stripe, Apelsin
- SMS: Eskiz, Playmobile, Twilio
- Email: Resend, Postmark, SMTP

## Compliance
- Uzbekistan Law 547 (Persdata)
- GDPR-style data subject rights
- PII encryption (pgsodium), RLS isolation, settings audit hash chain

## Trust
- Status: https://status.clary.uz
- Security disclosure: security@clary.uz
